horizontal-layer-monorepo.title: Horizontal layer monorepo
horizontal-layer-monorepo.decision: Organize as contracts → adapters → engine → API → dashboard → guardrails
horizontal-layer-monorepo.rationale: Each phase ships a complete horizontal slice; shared Zod contracts prevent drift

temporal-promotion-orchestration.title: Temporal for promotion lifecycle
temporal-promotion-orchestration.decision: Multi-stage promotion runs as Temporal workflow with pause/resume/abort signals
temporal-promotion-orchestration.rationale: Long-running gates and durable state require workflow engine

zod-contract-boundary.title: Zod schemas as validation source of truth
zod-contract-boundary.decision: All API and repository boundaries validate via @ff-promo/contracts
zod-contract-boundary.rationale: Single schema shared by Fastify routes, services, and web api-client types

guardrail-service.title: Pure GuardrailService for promotion bounds
guardrail-service.decision: Centralize pipeline config and promotion validation in guardrail.service.ts
guardrail-service.rationale: Server-side enforcement of active pipeline, flagKey match, required metrics per stage

immutable-pipeline-config.title: Immutable pipeline configuration
immutable-pipeline-config.decision: PATCH allowlist isActive and description only; deactivate + new version for changes
immutable-pipeline-config.rationale: Audit trail integrity; prevent retroactive gate policy tampering

pipeline-config-audit.title: Separate PipelineConfigAudit from promotion AuditEvent
pipeline-config-audit.decision: Config changes audited in PipelineConfigAudit table, not promotion AuditEvent
pipeline-config-audit.rationale: AuditEvent requires promotionRunId; config events are pipeline-scoped

nextjs-bff-proxy.title: Next.js BFF proxy for dashboard API calls
nextjs-bff-proxy.decision: Browser calls /api/ff-promo/* proxied to Fastify with API key injection
nextjs-bff-proxy.rationale: Keeps API key server-side; avoids CORS for local dashboard dev

required-gate-metrics.title: Required error_rate and latency_p95 per stage
required-gate-metrics.decision: Every pipeline stage must define both metric gate policies
required-gate-metrics.rationale: Aligns with PromQL builder metric types and SLO coverage (TELE-01, TELE-02)
